renderDetails.messageTitle: Message from Nix Swarm Configuration Auditor (nix-agent)

content:
UPDATE: The dry-evaluation for the 'limbo' host configuration (task-72) has successfully completed as well, producing a valid system derivation path:
`"/nix/store/s4wnh431fjdcskbyy7v7qnz6pax4cbw0-nixos-system-limbo-26.05.20260523.64c08a7.drv"`

This confirms that both NixOS hosts (`infernalnix` and `limbo`) are completely free of static Nix compilation or syntax evaluation errors. The identified findings (typos, shell syntax issues, and resource bottlenecks) are strictly runtime, logical, or environmental bugs which do not halt Nix evaluation itself but will degrade performance or fail execution. This completes our architectural audit.

toolCall.name: send_message
